trait.name: Description
trait.text:
You had a purpose in mind. Perhaps you were seeking out knowledge or power. Or maybe you were in search of hidden secrets. One way or another, your journey lead you to seek out an extraplanar entity. Once you made contact, a deal was struck, and your life changed.
• Ability Scores: Constitution, Intelligence, Charisma • Feat: Choose one Planar Pact feat • Skill Proficiencies: Arcana and Persuasion • Tool Proficiencies: Calligrapher's Supplies • Equipment: Choose A or B: (A) Book, Calligrapher's Supplies, Ink, Ink Pen, Parchment (10 sheets), Traveler's Clothes, 2 GP; or (B) 50 GP.
Source: DND Beyond Drops - May

trait.name: Feat: Choose one Planar Pact feat
trait.text: Choose one feat with the 'Planar Pact' tag.

trait.name: Feat: Choose one Planar Pact feat
trait.text: Choose one feat with the 'Planar Pact' tag.

trait.name: Tool Proficiencies: Calligrapher's Supplies
trait.text: Each background gives a character proficiency with one tool—either a specific tool or one chosen from the Artisan's Tools category.

trait.name: Starting Equipment
trait.text: Choose A or B: (A) Book, Calligrapher's Supplies, Ink, Ink Pen, Parchment (10 sheets), Traveler's Clothes, 2 GP; or (B) 50 GP.
